dao_subtitle_after: that empower Decentralized Universal Kindness Economy
dao_duki_desc: in Action — kindness first, where every act of kindness generates DUKI, a Decentralized Universal Kindness Income for all.
welcome_subtitle: Your username is minted on-chain. Send any amount of stablecoin to claim it — every cent flows to the DUKI treasury.
welcome_skip: Skip for now — mint my name later
welcome_step1_title: Makers Marketing by sharing profits globally
welcome_step1_body: Sellers and makers price their products to share profits beyond shareholders — with the world. This is the DUKI deal: open, borderless, aligned.
welcome_step2_title: A deal the taker fulfills, minting DUKI + ALM
welcome_step2_body: When a taker buys from a maker, stablecoin flows into the treasury. Two tokens are minted:
welcome_duki_desc: Stays locked in the treasury — backs real human income
welcome_alm_desc: 50% to maker · 50% to taker — governance & rewards
welcome_step3_title: DUKI flows to all as a reminder of 'Kindness First'
welcome_step3_body: DUKI is distributed proportionally to verified humans on Ethereum, backed by World ID. No bots. No whales. People only.
welcome_step4_title: Do whatever you want — the world's future depends on all
welcome_step4_body: Spend or redeem DUKI. Use it directly as currency, or redeem for stablecoins from the treasury. Redemption must happen on the originating chain.
submit_signin_hint: You need to sign in before submitting.
submit_mint_hint: You need to mint a username before submitting.
connect_step3_desc: Choose a name and make your first DUKI transaction
mint_err_mixed_script: Cannot mix Latin and Cyrillic characters
